function.message: Completed the next inbound note. I processed all 8 requested finance documents through the OCR/frontmatter workflow by adding schema-compliant YAML frontmatter and preserving each original note body verbatim, then removed the processed inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed identity bootstrap (tree /, read AGENTS.MD, context), inspected 99_system docs before task work, used OCR + migration workflows and finance schema, preserved original bodies during frontmatter migration, processed all files listed in inbox request, and deleted inbox item after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox note explicitly listed 8 finance files to OCR. Each listed file was read and updated with required invoice/bill schema fields (`record_type`, identifiers, date, totals, counterparty, project, ordered `lines`, optional `related_entity`) extracted from visible note data, while retaining the original body text beneath frontmatter. After all 8 were completed, the inbox file was deleted per inbox-processing cleanup rules.
completed_steps_laconic: write updated frontmatter to all 8 records
